programme.title: Magnum P.I.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: A decorated former Navy SEAL returns home from Afghanistan and repurposes his military skills to become a private investigator in Hawaii.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Magnum helps a struggling fisherman and fellow veteran when his 300-pound tuna worth $350,000 is stolen, only to learn that the thief needs Magnum's help as well.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Magnum takes a case from fellow private investigator Luther Gillis to find the true identity of a man's comatose fiancée when he learns that she's had extensive facial surgery.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: An art connoisseur and close friend of Higgins who recently hired Magnum to test his security is murdered, and Thomas is arrested as the main suspect.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: Surviving Love
programme.desc: A couple decides to settle their divorce in a civilized manner without lawyers, which brings complications.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Emma (Uma Thurman), a radio host, is about to be married to Richard (Colin Firth), her perfect match. But right before her wedding, she learns she's already married to Patrick (Jeffrey Dean Morgan), a charming but irresponsible fireman. Furthermore, Patrick has a secret: he has arranged this little trick because Emma advised Patrick's ex-fiancee to end their relationship. However, Patrick may find that the trick is on him, for he soon begins to fall in love with his uptight adversary.

programme.title: Serving Sara
programme.desc: When Sara (Elizabeth Hurley) is served divorce papers while she is in New York, she is stunned. Not about to lose the fortune she amassed with her self-serving Texan husband, she makes an offer to her process server, Joe (Matthew Perry), that sets them off on a wild trip across the country.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: A former getaway driver jeopardizes his Witness Protection Plan.

programme.title: Marlowe
programme.desc: Bay City, down on his luck detective is hired to find the ex-lover of a glamorous heiress.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber turns himself in.

programme.title: The Marksman
programme.desc: A rancher on the Arizona border becomes the unlikely defender of a young Mexican boy desperately fleeing the cartel assassins who've pursued him into the U.S.

programme.title: Lake Placid
programme.desc: A small Maine town is threatened by a killer crocodile. (Edited for TV)

programme.title: Battlefield Earth
programme.desc: Battle-charged excitement based on the multimillion-copy bestseller! In the year 3000, John Travolta leads the alien captors of Earth against human freedom fighters struggling to take back the planet in this explosive, eye-popping science-fiction extravaganza.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young interracial couple move into their dream home and are increasingly harassed by their next-door neighbor, a tightly wound black LAPD officer. When the couple decides to fight back the feud turns deadly.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: Drive, directed by Nicolas Winding Refn, about a Hollywood stunt performer (Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman for criminals discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: It Had To Be You
programme.desc: Ginger Rogers stars in this fanciful, screwball comedy as a young woman who has left three grooms standing at the altar...and is about to do it again! Cornel Wilde co-stars as the gentleman who tempts her away from the altar and then succeeds in marrying her himself.

programme.title: Under The Yum Yum Tree
programme.desc: A couple in love agree to determine their "character compatability" by living together platonically.

programme.title: Only Angels Have Wings
programme.desc: ONLY ANGELS HAVE WINGS is a powerful character study and an amazing adventure film in which Grant, the head of a broken-down air freight company, sends courageous pilots over the treacherous Andes Mountains in Peru. Rita Hayworth gives a notable performance as a vamp.

programme.title: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Humphrey Bogart s final screen appearance as a cynical sportswriter involved in the boxing racket.

programme.title: Dominion: Prequel To The Exorcist
programme.desc: Years before Father Lankester Merrin helped save Regan MacNeil's soul, he first encounters the demon Pazuzu in East Africa. Merrin's initial battle with Pazuzu leads to the rediscovery of his faith.

programme.title: Plan 9 From Outer Space
programme.desc: Evil aliens attack Earth and set their terrible "Plan 9" into action. As the aliens resurrect the dead of the Earth, the lives of the living are in danger.

programme.title: Yakuza Wolf 2
programme.desc: Attacking Asao Uchida's lonely, clifftop mansion in no-holds barred massacre.

programme.title: Security
programme.desc: A security guard protects an eleven year-old girl who is being targeted by a gang for participating as a trial witness.

programme.title: Operation Seawolf
programme.desc: In the last days of WWII, Germany, desperate for any last grasp to defeat the allied powers, looked to their last remaining weapons and soldiers. The German Navy and the last remaining U-Boats, were formed together for one last mission to attack the United States Homeland. Captain Hans Kessler (Lundgren) a grizzled submarine commander from both world wars, is called into service to help turn the tide of the war. The mission was soon to be known as Operation Seawolf.

programme.title: Dragon Blade
programme.desc: A Hun-Chinese commander and a Roman General form an unlikely partnership in this battle-charged tale.

programme.title: Iron Mask
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger and Jackie Chan face off against each other in battle in this globe-trotting adventure!

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: A humble businessman with a buried past seeks justice when his daughter is killed in an act of terrorism.

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: A police inspector tracks down a deranged villain who is out to kidnap his daughter.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: An American teen joins up with a band of martial arts warriors in order to free the imprisoned Monkey King.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Meteor: Day One
programme.desc: A quest begins to find an ancient dial that controls the skies.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: The Golden Cane Warrior
programme.desc: When an aging martial arts master chooses two of her meeker students to be her successors, two older students steal her mystical cane and pursue their rivals.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A retired bodyguard in the early stages of dementia befriends a young girl. When her father's criminal connections place her in danger, the bodyguard calls upon forgotten skills to keep her safe.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: A highly trained and exceptionally deadly swordsman looks for revenge after being caught in the middle of a power struggle that results in the assassination of an innocent woman's family.

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
programme.desc: Defeated by Master Ip, martial arts expert Cheung Tin Chi tries to lead a normal life in Hong Kong until triad leaders draw him back into fighting.

programme.title: Hydra
programme.desc: While working as a chef in Tokyo, a retired assassin becomes drawn into a brutal death game.

programme.title: The Single's Guidebook
programme.desc: A content creator making a series about singlehood meets her match in polar-opposite, Jackson.

programme.title: WWJD2 The Woodcarver
programme.desc: A troubled teenage boy helps an aging wood carver finish an impossibly difficult job.

programme.title: A Father's Choice
programme.desc: An unforgettable story about the promise and the power of family.

programme.title: The Wedding Chapel
programme.desc: Uninspired and newly single, painter Sara is down on her luck and wants nothing more than to get away.

programme.title: Finding Love in Saint Lucia
programme.desc: An Ornithologist and a Journalist partner up to save an endangered bird species in the jungle of Saint Lucia.

programme.title: Pain & Harmony
programme.desc: In pursuit of growing her skills as a singer, Harmony faces troubles at her new school, in the music industry, and in her personal life. While dealing with betrayal, she has to be there for her classmates as they prepare for a music competition.

programme.title: Blessed & Cursed
programme.desc: Pain, Deceit and Triumph are just some of the plots twists that viewers will experience in this highly anticipated movie! A modern retelling of the dramatic Biblical account of Saul and David, Blessed & Cursed stars Gospel sensation Deitrick Haddon in his first theatrical debut as Dwight Hawkins an incredibly gifted young man who is in search of his purpose amid setbacks and unexpected surprises!

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Rounding
programme.desc: After a traumatic incident, a driven young medical resident transfers to a rural hospital for a fresh start, but the demons of his past start to catch up to him when he becomes consumed by the case of a patient with mysterious symptoms.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: Broken Buckets
programme.desc: After serving 17 years in prison, Travis Cane returns home to rebuild his life and reconnect with his family. But his once bright son, Dontae is acting out and abandoned his goals in basketball for a life on the streets. Hoping to repair their relationship, they work out their struggles on the court.

programme.title: Commandments of a Female Hustler
programme.desc: Three childhood friends, Lala, Binky, and Jay grew up together on the streets of East Baltimore. Wanting a better life for themselves, they learn the ways of hustling. When they align themselves with one of the most powerful drug dealers in the game, their loyalties are tested, and the very commandments that once bound them start to break.

programme.title: How Did We Get Here
programme.desc: Four struggling couples attend a wellness retreat led by Dr. Sellers. Melonie and Derrick struggle with issues of infidelity, Omar and Sonya struggle with commitment, Chastity and Monae have differing opinions on parenthood, and Stephanie and Delvin are struggling with their intimacy. As the couples dive into their treatment, they must confront their own demons to move forward. Will they make it out together? Or go their separate ways?

programme.title: The Honeymoon
programme.desc: On her birthday, Summer is publicly humiliated when her fiancé, Chance, and her best friend, Portia, reveal their affair. Seeking revenge, she sabotages their honeymoon with the help of her friend Danisha. A deadly game of cat-and-mouse ensues, with betrayal, violence, and unexpected twists. Ultimately, Summer must confront the consequences of her actions as she fights for her life and seeks justice.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm: Time Wars
programme.desc: When Rumpelstiltskin tries to take over Earth, The Avengers Grimm must track him through time to defeat him.

programme.title: Tomb Invader
programme.desc: Determined to find out why her mother disappeared, an adventurer enters the dangerous Tomb of Quin Shi Huang.

programme.title: Meteor Moon
programme.desc: When a meteor crashes into the moon and shifts its axis, Earth’s gravity pulls it into the path of the planet.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: A team starts its journey to transport the only survivor of the zombie virus from NY to California.

programme.title: The Twisters
programme.desc: Dozens of deadly tornadoes converge, merging into a mega twister set to obliterate the United States.

programme.title: 2025 Armageddon
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth using the gigantic creatures and disasters found on a B-movie TV Channel.

programme.title: Mega Shark vs Crocosaurus (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The massive prehistoric shark has survived the last battle, and the world is again threatened when a new, more dangerous foe is discovered in the jungles of Africa.

programme.title: Aenigma (Edited Version)
programme.desc: For his final horror hit of the '80s, writer/director Lucio Fulci combined elements of CARRIE, PHENOMENA and SUSPIRIA with the grisly surrealism of his own past classics for one last shocker packed with brooding, ominous imagery and signature Fulci style (The Horror Syndicate): When a bullied student at a New England girls school becomes comatose after a prank gone wrong, her tormenters will suffer graphic telepathic punishment that includes the infamous 'death by snails' scene. Jared Martin (DALLAS), Lara Lamberti (A BLADE IN THE DARK) and Ulli Reinthaler (ZOMBIE 3) star in this blast from start to finish, with some of the most bonkers imagery Fulci ever put on film (The Video Vacuum) co-written by Giorgio Mariuzzo (THE BEYOND, HOUSE BY THE CEMETERY).

programme.title: 30 Miles From Nowhere
programme.desc: When five college pals return to rural Wisconsin for their estranged friend's funeral, what begins as an uneasy reunion becomes a terrifying fight for survival.

programme.title: The Editor (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Rey Ciso was once the greatest editor the world had ever seen. Since a horrific accident left him with four wooden fingers on his right hand, he's had to resort to cutting pulp films and trash pictures. When the lead actors from the film he's been editing turn up murdered at the studio, Rey is fingered as the number one suspect. The bodies continue to pile up in this absurdist giallo-thriller as Rey struggles to prove his innocence and learn the sinister truth lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: Humanoids From The Deep (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A race of scientifically created half-human, half-salmon monstrosities lay siege to a Pacific Northwest fishing village. In horrific fashion, the mutated creatures kill the men and mate with the women in order to reproduce. Can the Humanoids From the Deep be stopped before they destroy mankind as we know it?Soundtrack scored by Oscar-winning composer James Horner (Avatar, Titanic, Braveheart). Creature design from Oscar-winning make-up artist Rob Bottin (Total Recall, The Thing, Robocop, Se7en).

programme.title: Housemaid, The (2018)
programme.desc: On a plantation in 1953 Indochina, a troubled young housemaid finds comfort in the arms of the widowed owner, until his deceased wife returns to object.

programme.title: Contracted
programme.desc: A young woman has a one-night stand with a random stranger and contracts a mysterious disease.

programme.title: 32 Malasana Street
programme.desc: The Olmedo family decides to leave their village behind for a fresh start in the city and buy an old apartment at 32 Malasana. But soon after they've unpacked their bags, they discover something about their new home: they aren't alone....

programme.title: At the Devil's Door
programme.desc: A demonic entity terrorizes a group of young women while seeking a body to call home in this supernatural horror thriller. Co-starring Naya Rivera and Ashley Rickards.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. However, the Clampett's think he's wanting to marry Pearl, so Jed comes up with a plan to "save" the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "No Place Like Home" - Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this vintage western. He and George Gabby Hayes strike it rich with a gold mine, only to find their lives complicated by women and crooked officials. Things get even messier when the good guys are framed for murder! Its all action here, particularly since legendary stuntman Yakima Cannut stars as one of the films heavies. Who will win the fight over the gold and the girl? Directed by Robert N. Bradbury for Monogram Pictures. Also starring Barbara Sheldon. (The film was also known as Gold Strike River.)

programme.title: Lawless Frontier
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this vintage western about a man avenging the murder of his parents. Other cast members include frequent Wayne sidekick George 'Gabby Hayes', plus Yakima Canutt, Sheila Terry, and Jack Rockwell. This Paul Malvern Production from director Robert N. Bradbury also features Earl Dwire, one of the great B-movie villains, as Zanti, the ruthless bandit who sets the action in motion.

programme.title: McLintock
programme.desc: He likes his whiskey hard... His women soft... And his west all to himself! Inspired by Shakespeares The Taming of the Shrew (1594), John Wayne (The Searchers, Stagecoach), Maureen OHara (Miracle on 34th Street, The Parent Trap), and Patrick Wayne (The Searchers, The Alamo) star in this western comedy directed by Andrew V. McLaglen (Gunsmoke, The Wild Geese). George Washington McLintock (John Wayne) is the wealthiest man in his territory who utilizes his power and influence to maintain order between farmers, ranchers, Indians, corrupt government officials, and his own family! McLintock is McNificent!

programme.title: Doomed Caravan
programme.desc: Hoppy is enlisted to help protect Jane Travers' next caravan against robbers who have been terrorizing travelers. He comes across a wily pair of thieves who hve their men disguised as soldiers to escort the caravan. Hoppy isn't fooled for a second and busts up their plan with help from the Bar 20 boys. Not to be outdone, the thieves then capture everyone but Hoppy and puts them before a firing squad. Not it's up to Hoppy to rescue his friends singlehandedly. The cast includes William Boyd as Hopalong Cassidy, with Russell Hayden and Andy Clyde as Luky Jenkins and California Jack. For those counting, this was the 32nd of 66 Hopalong Cassidy adventures. They would be edited for syndication on television, bringing Hoppy and his friends to a whole new generation of fans.

programme.title: £4000 MANUAL XKR Inspected By Jaguar!

programme.title: Old 911 vs new 911: Can an amateur driver beat ex-Stig Ben Collins?

We pitched GoPro CEO Nick Woodman up against Ben Collins to see if it’s possible to take down the Stig with newer machinery.

programme.title: Richard Hammond drives his 530bhp Grand Tour Subaru for the first time – And it's incredible!
programme.desc: Richard Hammond has been waiting a long time to test out his newly-tuned Subaru Impreza from the Grand Tour. After 2023 was spent building Martin the Subaru into a 530bhp, all-wheel drive, manual monster, Richard is finally thrown the keys to take it for a spin on his favourite Welsh Highland road.

programme.title: We're putting a V10 into a Mazda MX-5! | Ep.5
programme.desc: We are making two V10 Mazda MX-5s! While we wait for the crazy Connaught 2.0-litre engine to be finished, we are cracking on building a car with an existing V10. And here it is! Let the games begin.

programme.title: Is our 0.6-litre Suzuki Cappuccino faster than a Mk1 MX-5? | TRACK BATTLE Ft. Abbie Eaton
programme.desc: We bought a tiny little kei car – a Suzuki Cappuccino – earlier this year with one goal in mind; making it quicker than the current go-to entry-level sportscar, the Mazda MX-5. Has Mike accomplished his goal? With the help of Abbie Eaton, let's find out!

programme.title: Richard Hammond has saved ANOTHER Grand Tour car!
programme.desc: Richard is really getting into a flow with his TV car collecting, and this little fighter is one of the coolest yet. Welcome a new addition to Hammond’s garage, fresh from The Grand Tour!

programme.title: Richard Hammond FINALLY drives the new Porsche 911 GT3!
programme.desc: He has always loved a 911, but Richard Hammond hasn’t managed to get behind the wheel of a Porsche 911 992 yet. So he’s gone straight to the deep end with a new GT3!

programme.title: We reunited Richard Hammond with his favourite Grand Tour car!
programme.desc: Richard Hammond recently decided that Martin the Subaru Impreza was his favourite Grand Tour car ever. After Mike Fernie spent most of 2023 fixing and modifying the Subaru to the 530bhp monster it now is, he took Richard around the car to show off all of the work undertaken.

programme.title: This mind-blowing British supercar can do 215mph with just 440hp!
programme.desc: TVR is about as famous as defunct British car companies get. But we bet you haven't heard of this one – the 440R. What is stunning about this car is that it could achieve a top speed of 215mph using only 440hp. Name a car that can get to that high a speed, with that low a power output?! Mike Fernie investigates this amazing piece of Blackpool engineering.

programme.title: This is Richard's Hammond's new prized possession!

Richard Hammond sends Mike Fernie on a mission to upgrade his motorbike helmet, and Mike decided to go to the best in the business – Joe Tanner at Rennat Design – to create a seriously cool helmet.

programme.title: Richard Hammond teaches his daughter how to rally a Subaru!

programme.title: Can Richard Hammond’s workshop save this £1500 forgotten performance saloon?
programme.desc: After Mike Fernie purchases an incredibly rare Rover 620Ti, Ben Collins set about roasting it for its very sorry condition, especially the paint which had been very badly sun damaged and scratched away. To bring this 1990s performance saloon back to its best, Mike has brought it to The Smallest Cog to see if they can save it from 30 years of corrosion and damage.

programme.title: Richard Hammond has bought a car he has lusted after for years!

programme.title: Richard Hammond welcomes a truly ICONIC car to his workshop!

This episode features the one and only AutoAlex (Alex Kersten) and his world-famous Mazda MX-5, Phil! While Alex Kersten is chatting with Richard Hammond upstairs, Mike and Anthony get the Miata MX5 up on the ramp to see how the car is holding up!

Through simple fixes, sponsor parts and ingenuity, can they go from a low-power shed to a supercar-rivalling beast? In this second episode, Mike uses the ��1900 from the selling of car number 1 to step up the ladder from a Ford KA to a BMW Z3. programme.desc: Despite being arguably the most famous car presenter ever, we take Richard Hammond back to the start and put him through a legitimate UK driving test, to see whether he can get through without a single minor or major issue. programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Chris Makes Beef & Broccoli" - Who doesn't love broccoli beef (other than vegetarians)??? Lucky for you, Chris Ying woke up with a craving for THAT EXACT DISH. Here he shows you how to make his dead simple version (using the microwave to speed things up). This is some high-quality weeknight cooking, people! Make it for yourself and let us know what you think.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: Cooking School - David Chang Makes 5 Easy Recipes Using His New Korean BBQ Sauces: David Chang shows off some of his favorite ways to use his new Momofuku Korean BBQ Sauces, including a vinaigrette salad dressing that he makes two different salads for, a simple beef & broccoli recipe, Dakdoritang (spicy chicken stew), Gamja Jorim (Korean braised potatoes), and a deliciously easy steak sauce.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Brandon Jew's "MSG" Fried Chicken" - Chef Brandon Jew, owner of Michelin-starred Mr. Jiu's in San Francisco's Chinatown, shares his recipe and techniques for making his "MSG" (mushroom/seaweed/garlic) Fried Chicken, inspired by the original fried chicken recipe from his grandfather's restaurant, The Four Seas.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Pork and Chive Dumplings with Chris Ying" - Chris Ying has made a lot of dumplings in his day. In fact, he always keeps a batch in the freezer for whenever the kids need a quick dinner. Today, he shares his go-to pork dumpling recipe, including two quick sauces.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Fresh Bok Choy Kimchi with Monica Lee" - The wonderful Monica Lee of Beverly Soon Tofu is back in the kitchen with her daughters to share her recipe for fresh Bok Choy Kimchi. This is an easy way to have a big batch of homemade kimchi in the fridge, or split it in half to use some to make a quick banchan. This recipe and many more are available in Monica's new book, Sohn-mat: Recipes and Flavors of Korean Home Cooking.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Feast of the 7 Fishes: David Chang and Chris Ying attempt to make it all in 45 minutes!" - David Chang is at it again, dragging his buddy Chris Ying along in a no-horse open sleigh for the daunting challenge of preparing an entire Feast of 7 Fishes spread in 45 minutes! Once the timer starts, it's completely unedited and presented in real-time. No cuts, no tricks..nothing but Peter, Kate, Buzz, Megan, Linnie and Jeff

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "David Chang Makes an Epic Thanksgiving Leftover Sandwich" - Dave has joined forces with Amazon Prime Thursday Night Football to create a new tradition for their first-ever Black Friday Football game on November 24—make a ridiculous sandwich for the game MVP using Thanksgiving leftovers. This is Dave's first attempt, so there are plenty of learnings discovered along the way as he tries to construct a worthy sandwich...making an entire Thanksgiving spread along the way. Get ready to unhinge your jaw, because this sandwich is something straight out of Shaggy and Scoob's playbook.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Dave Chang makes BEER CAN CHICKEN the wrong way (and it’s so good)" - Two days after failing at his first ever Beer Can Chicken attempt, Dave gets right back on the horse. He’s committed to getting it right, keeping it simple, and making the white meat as delicious as the dark. Plus: he demonstrates a lazy man's beer pan sauce that will make you question ever doing things the “right” way again.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Sunday Gravy All Week: We don't need to tell you that kids like spaghetti and meatballs. Who doesn't? And Sunday gravy—with its chunks of fatty meat and sausage bobbing around in red sauce with the meatballs—is even better. Now, the real prize is what else you can do with that gravy. It's not just for lasagna and eggplant parm. Chris Ying shows you his Sunday Gravy recipe, and then how to take that same punchy, meaty, tomato-based umami sauce and use it to make beefy bean and cheese burritos and ratatouille.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Whole Roasted Chicken with Morgan McGlone: Our friend Morgan McGlone has cooked a lot of chicken—or "chook," as they call it in Australia, where he's from. He's a hell of a chef and restaurateur, as well as an excellent father to his son, Ryo. In this episode, he talks us through his roast chicken method, which, spoiler alert, involves a lot of butter. This is a bit of a long cook, so it's more of a weekend dish, but nothing beats breaking into a whole chicken with your family. The kids get to see food in its whole form, and pick the pices they want. The only decision you have to make is whether to share the best bits, or save them for yourself.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Japanese Curry Your Kids (and You!) Will Love: Chris Ying shares his recipe for a creamy, dreamy Japanese curry that uses milk and honey to hit all the right notes that kids love. If your kids already like curry...you're golden with this recipe! And if your kids are new to the curry game, this is the perfect introduction.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime: Sweet & Sour Pork Ribs (aka "Kid McGear Bones") - Chris makes a go-to favorite for his kids—sticky, sweet and sour pork ribs in bite-sized portions.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Chicken Pot Pie" - Chris makes a recipe for beginner chicken pot pie from Allrecipes.com, using leftover chicken and canned potatoes. Yes, potatoes from a can.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Emeril and dairy farm owner Sarah Roland create dishes using buffalo mozzarella.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom head to Verbier, one of the world’s most exclusive ski resorts, for a sprinkling of wintery magic and cheese. A lot of cheese. They try Europe’s highest fondue in an igloo on the summit of the Mont-Fort, eat raclette prepared by a robot and learn to bake bread the traditional way in one of the few remaining communal ovens in Switzerland.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: On Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet life and food of its local farmers, in contrast to the reputation as a dazzling party island. She tastes onion pie, delicious cured pork, and one of the oldest cheeses in the world, kopanisti, still made on the island. In the kitchen, she makes a garlicky local pasta recipe, and a traditional Greek island fish soup.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Gorgeous cafes, bustling nightlife, yachting and water sports, just 20 minutes south of the Greek capital, Athens. Diane visits a fish market where the catch is right off the boat, sails the coast, and returns to her kitchen to create three delicious, contemporary Greek recipes, inspired by the cosmopolitan bustle and fun-loving spirit of the Athenian coast.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits a famous local marble sculptor en route to visit an old friend and great cook, where she learns the secrets of pinched sweet cheese cakes, ancient sesame-honey confections and more. Back in her own kitchen, she creates a luscious Tinos-style artichoke bread pudding and red mullet in caper sauce, both Tinos traditional specialties.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane and friend and ultramarathoner, Dean Karnazes, meet up for a run. He helps Diane hone her technique, sharing healthy eating tips. Together they make a simple Greek salad with local ingredients and enjoy perfect Mediterranean living. Back in her kitchen, Diane cooks up a very healthy plant-forward Messinian meal, with lots of olive oil, beans and greens.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Killer Barbecue – Hold the Meat You don’t need a degree in barbecue to know that vegetables have hit the grill big time. Veggies for hardcore carnivores who crave killer accompaniments to their meats, for health-conscious grillers, and for everyone who delights in the smokiness and supernatural sweetness live fire imparts to plant and dairy foods.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Charm City ‘Que: Baltimore, the town where I grew up, boasts plenty of awesome foods for grilling. Pit beef was born here. In the seafood department you find a sweet white-fleshed fish the rest of the world calls striped bass and Baltimoreans know as rockfish. And no Charm City meal would be complete without chocolate top cookies.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue on a Budget: A lot of American barbecue began with inexpensive meat cuts, like spareribs, beef shoulder, and pork belly. With the economic insecurities brought on by COVID- 9, we’re all feeling the pinch, and budget grilling has taken on new urgency. Besides, why should Kobe beef and tomahawk steaks get all the love? This is barbecue on a budget.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Sustainable Seafood: Pollution. Overfishing. Abusive labor practices. There’s a lot of negative news coming out about the seafood industry lately, and much of it breaks your heart. Today’s show celebrates seafood we can eat because it’s fished in a way that’s humane and environmentally sound. Activists call it sustainable seafood. I call it three great reasons for firing up your grill.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques celebrates birthdays, anniversaries and holidays with special meals. It’s when he splurges on caviar, oysters, even truffles–the ultimate extravagance. These occasions are a time to gather together around the table with family and friends and indulge in our favorite foods and wines.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: When the weather heats up it’s time for family dishes that work on the grill or in the pan. Jacques' great summer menu with Asparagus in Butter Sauce, a Grilled Steak with Zucchini, topped with Anchovy Butter, Curly Dogs for the kids. He shows you classic ways to cut potatoes and ends with a Patriotic Raspberry and Blueberry Galette.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques loves seafood and feels lucky to live by Long Island Sound with its wonderful stocks of Atlantic fish and shellfish. He prepares scallops, crab and cod––raw, fried, sauteed or grilled in dishes that are quick, simple and delicious.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques shows that with a well-stocked pantry and a few good cooking techniques, you can make a tasty dish or a simple meal. His pantry essentials include potato flakes for a simple soup, spaghetti for a quick main dish, lentils, canned salmon, polenta and finally, in the freezer, a poundcake that can be transformed into a celebration dessert.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom explore Kyushu, the most southerly of the Japanese main islands. They master the art of making the world famous Tonkotsu Ramen, fashion their own sushi knives with the help of a blacksmith who ordinarily has an eight-year waiting list for his product, and participate in a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Sarah and her cat Bodhi have lived in a van for the past two years in western Canada. She gives us a full tour of her classic camper van. Sarah also shares her personal experience about what Vanlife is like for her and why she chose the van that she did.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Electrician builds out a 4x4 sprinter into a modern camper that they are able to both live in and work mobile. This build is done with aluminum and pvc boards, has solar, a composting toilet and everything they need to live comfortably. They also share insights from life on the road.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Virginia lives in her van full-time. She has been traveling North America in her Ford Transit that she designed herself and helped mostly DIY'ers build. Virginia wasn't sure what she was going to do with her retirement until she learned about van life and decided that designing and building out a van to travel and live in was her next creative project.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Amazing DIY camper build with beautiful interior woodwork. This 1988 GMC Vandura went from being an old camper to a tiny house that feels nice and cozy inside like a cabin on wheels. This couple has made this small space their home for over two years.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: John worked with professional van builders to create his high tech sprinter van conversion, equipped with a tiltable solar array, lithium batteries and everything he needs to be a digital nomad and travel in northern Canada. He gives us a tour through his tiny home on wheels and shares what Vanlife means to him.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Storm lives full-time in his DIY Astro Minivan while attending university full-time in one of Canada's most expensive cities. He believes this is a good option for students to save money by not having to pay for rent and using the facilities at school to make van living easier.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Meg and Molly, along with their two cats and one dog, live full-time in a van tiny house that they built from a Montreal fire department utility truck. They have been traveling North America for the past two years. Meg built the van out herself with some help for the solar and plumbing.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Jo bought a van to live in and use as a bedroom instead of paying rent in Canada's most expensive city. After finding some roof and window leaks during the winter, she decided to invest some money into renovation and repairing this classic camper van. She used creativity and kept her expenses low while still providing the amenities that she needed.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Frank and his cat Sunny live in this lifted converted 1998 Chevy Express van. Frank has renovated the build multiple times to fit different needs, and now it is built out to fit just him and his cat. He built it as a 4 seasons camper capable of going off road to explore the less touristy places, with R-14 rockwool insulation, a diesel heater, listed suspension, and upgraded tires.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Dani tours us around and through his amazing DIY Minivan build that he lives in full time. He spent many hours on this passion project with the idea that the build process should be fun. This van has a full electrical system, a bed and unique storage systems.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Jason and Kenna live full time on their sailboat which is a Cheoy Lee offshore 41, and they give me a tour around this amazing boat. Jason has been sailing for years and has outfitted sailboats for off shore sailing from BC Canada to Hawaii, and Mexico, but this is what he calls his forever boat. Kenna grew up in the Canadian prairies and never sailed until she met Jason in Victoria BC.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Join Diane and explore the origins of the phyllo pie from New York City to the Greek countryside. We will also learn how to create Spanakopita, Messy Orange Pie, and how to use phyllo as a base for an array of savory and sweet dishes.

programme.title: Me, Myself, and the World
programme.desc: Pamela finishes her stay in Bangkok by experiencing Chinese New Year. She then reflects on her travels overall, believing that the art of solo travel is about the relationships she builds with the people she meets along her journeys.

programme.title: Me, Myself, and the World
programme.desc: On the third and final leg of Pamela's tour of Hanoi she and Patricia, a U.S. Army veteran, have a unique chance to meet a North Vietnamese veteran. Pamela also has some tips on the best travel apps to have handy during your solo travels.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Mickela learns the Kandyan dance at the Sri Lankan Dance Academy and visits the family-owned restaurants on Victory Blvd. that prepare traditional dishes. She also celebrates with the incredibly diverse community through song and cricket.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: In Uzbekistan, Mickela learns to play the doyra in Tashkent, visits the 700-year-old Siyob Bazaar along the ancient Silk Road in Samarkand, dances in the UNESCO World Heritage City of Bukhara, and shares a traditional dish of plov.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: From the bustling city of Istanbul to the fairy caves of Cappadocia, Turkey calls two continents home, and is a country that contains a rich culture of dance and music. Here, Mickela speaks the universal language of dance with the locals.

programme.title: Dream of Italy
programme.desc: Kathy travels to the ancestral village of her maternal great-grandfather in Castelvetere sul Calore to trace her family's roots. Her visit is full of surprises and the kind of magic that can only take place in Southern Italy.

programme.title: Dream of Italy
programme.desc: Kathy McCabe invites you to experience the essence of Rome. Discover the Testaccio Market's incredible food, taste true Roman Cacio e Pepe and gelato, learn the beautiful craft of mosaics, and attend a grand ball at Palazzo Brancaccio.

programme.title: Dream of Italy
programme.desc: There is only one Venice. Join Kathy as she receives rowing lessons from an 8th-generation gondolier and learns how Venice is contending with rising sea levels. We will also meet an impiraressa and visit the ancient Rialto Market.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: Chase happiness with Darley in the brilliant sunflower fields of North Dakota. You will also visit quirky roadside attractions, and experience fun river cruises, art alleys, museums, boutique hotels, cafes, breweries, and great cuisine.

programme.title: Travels with Darley
programme.desc: Join Darley on a revolutionary road trip in South Carolina. Historic sites and untold stories speak to the American Revolution, including visits to The Charleston Museum, Heyward Washington House, and restaurants with Gullah Geechee roots.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Mickela celebrates black voices in the arts by dancing with the renowned Dance Theatre of Harlem and the Alvin Ailey American Dance Theater. She also drums and dances with the Brooklyn United Marching Band and pays homage to Juneteenth.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Mickela examines Portugal's colonial influence on the indigenous tribal communities of Eastern Malaysia as she joins in on the annual celebration of Gawai Dayak, the Harvest Festival.

programme.title: Music Voyager
programme.desc: As we traverse the island of Eleuthera, we learn that while life may seem different between Eleuthera, Harbor Islands, and Spanish Wells, it is the people that collectively possess a single voice that ultimately forms the island's culture.

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: How did this UNESCO town in Mexico get such a curious name? Why do so many mansions exist here? What do postcards have to do with the town's soaring Gothic church? Why is there an art school in a former convent? And how did the town become a magnet for retired American military on the G.I. Bill?

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Why did the English choose Jamestown, Yorktown, and Williamsburg, Virginia as their early American settlements? Why did King William III and Queen Mary II establish a university here? What was life like for the early colonists here? What crazy concoctions are to be found in a colonial apothecary?

They're tailed by Pinkerton detectives, Cody's savings are stolen by a bandit (James Russo), and Eileen is wrongfully jailed for bank robbery. Now the remaining three girls must decide whether to liberate their friend or their funds first.
